name: Sprint Board
description: A two-week agile sprint workflow for software teams — backlog grooming, sprint planning, a Kanban board grouped by status, and a burndown-friendly points estimate scale.

teams.name: Engineering
teams.description: Core product engineering team running two-week sprints with Fibonacci story points.

workflowStates.name: Todo
workflowStates.description: Scoped, estimated, and pulled into the current sprint.

workflowStates.name: In Review
workflowStates.description: Code review / QA pass in flight.

workflowStates.name: Done
workflowStates.description: Merged and verified in the sprint.

workflowStates.name: Canceled
workflowStates.description: Won't be done this sprint or ever.

labels.name: tech-debt
labels.description: Refactor, cleanup, or paying down debt.

labels.name: design
labels.description: Needs design input or a design pass.

issueTemplates.title: Sprint Goal: ship the [feature] end to end
issueTemplates.descriptionMd:
## Sprint Goal

One sentence describing the outcome this sprint delivers.

### Success criteria
- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2

### Risks
- Risk / dependency to watch

issueTemplates.title: Set up CI pipeline gate for main branch
issueTemplates.descriptionMd: Add lint + typecheck + test as required checks before merge to `main`.

issueTemplates.title: Fix flaky test in checkout flow
issueTemplates.descriptionMd: `checkout.spec.ts` fails intermittently in CI (~1 in 20 runs). Repro locally with `--repeat-each=20`.

issueTemplates.title: Implement dark mode toggle
issueTemplates.descriptionMd: Add a theme toggle in settings; persist preference; respect `prefers-color-scheme` by default.

issueTemplates.title: Refactor auth middleware into composable guards
issueTemplates.descriptionMd: Current middleware is one 400-line function. Split into small, testable guard functions.

issueTemplates.title: Add rate limiting to the public API
issueTemplates.descriptionMd: Token-bucket limiter per API key. Return `429` with `Retry-After`. Document limits in API docs.

issueTemplates.title: Spike: evaluate WebSocket library for live presence
issueTemplates.descriptionMd: Compare Socket.IO vs. raw `ws` vs. a hosted realtime provider. Timebox: 1 day. Output: a short recommendation doc.

issueTemplates.title: Write onboarding docs for new engineers
issueTemplates.descriptionMd: One page: repo layout, how to run locally, how to ship a PR, who to ask about what.

views.name: Sprint Board
views.description: Kanban board grouped by workflow status for the active sprint.

views.name: Sprint Backlog
views.description: Flat, ranked list of everything not yet started.

views.name: This Sprint — Table
views.description: Spreadsheet view of the current cycle with estimate, assignee, and status columns.
